2008March 15, 2008

🇺🇸 Louisville, KY, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Louisville, KY, USA, March 2008

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2008-03-louisville-ky-usa

13 Resolutions

745Plenary
Appoint Bengt Olsson as liaison officer to ISO/TC 29/WG 34
SC4 welcomes the offer of Bengt Olsson to act as liaison officer to ISO/TC 29/WG 34 and appoints Bengt Olsson as liaison officer to ISO/TC 29/WG 34.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
744Plenary
Appoint Dr. King Yee as liaison officer to ISO/TC 171 and SC 2
SC4 appoints Dr King Yee as the liaison officer to ISO/TC 171 and SC 2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
743Plenary
Extend ISO/TC 118 liaison to SC 1 and welcome Gerd Koziel
Further to Resolution 725, SC4 welcomes Gerd Koziel as liaison officer from ISO/TC 118 to ISO/TC 184/SC 4, and extends the liaison to include ISO/TC 118/SC 1.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
742Plenary
Ballot SC 4 N2265 URI standing document
SC4 requests its Secretariat to submit SC4 N2265 "URI defined by an SC4 standard" with changes agreed at the Louisville meeting for ballot as a standing document.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
741Plenary
Submit ISO 22745 initial set of parts for DIS ballot
SC4 approves the submission of ISO/TS 22745 parts 1, 2, 11, 13 and 20 for ballot as International Standards.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
740Plenary
Create Task Force for Cross-AP-Implementations requirements
SC4 decides to establish an ad hoc Task Force to investigate how several modular and non-modular APs can be used in a single implementation. Members of the Task Force will be: Lothar Klein (Chair),...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
739Plenary
Appoint Howard Mason as liaison officer to OASIS
SC4 welcomes the offer of Howard Mason to act as liaison officer to OASIS and appoints Howard Mason as liaison officer to OASIS.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
738Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with MIMOSA and appoint Nils Sandsmark
SC4 decides to create a Category A liaison to the MIMOSA organization.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
737Plenary
Establish schedule and ballot process for AP 203 ed2
SC4 agrees to the following dates for AP 203: * 2008-03-21: target date for start of CD-TS ballot of AP 203 modules * 2008-03-31: target date for submission of AP 203 ed 2 to ISO for DIS ballot * 2...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
736Plenary
Reappoint David Loffredo as WG 11 Convener
SC4 appreciates and accepts the offer of David Loffredo to serve as Convener of WG 11 and approves the nomination of David Loffredo to serve for an additional three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its thanks to our SC4 short report presenters at the opening plenary for their representation to and for ISO/TC 184/SC 4: * OMG (David Price) * PDES, Inc. (Jack Harris) SC4 also offer...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to our SC4 Liaisons and those projects who presented at the Liaison Plenary: * NATO AC/135 -- "Building Bridges" (Steve Arnett) * "ISO 8000-110 Certification Program"...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to ECCMA -- The Electronic Commerce Code Management Association for its hosting of the 54th ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Plenary Meeting at the Marriott Downtown, Louisville, Kent...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
